case_title: AMEL ELSIDDIG ET AL VS. KENNETH WONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ELSIDDIG, AMEL ABDULLAH, OMAR AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KENNETH DBA WONG REALTY LLC; DBA REAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT WONG, MATTHEW DBA WONG REALTY LLC, DBA REAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER TO FEB-10-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AMEL ELSIDDIG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF OMAR ABDULLAH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KENNETH WONG IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTHEW WONG IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF ELSIDDIG PRESENTS PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUBSTITUTE SERVICE SERVED ON 11-14-2022 FOR BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF INSTRUCTED TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AT THE CLERK'S OFFICE IN RM 103 AND DOES NOT NEED TO RE-DO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELSIDDIG, AMEL ABDULLAH, OMAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, KENNETH DBA WONG REALTY LLC; DBA REAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT WONG, MATTHEW DBA WONG REALTY LLC, DBA REAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT $1,795.00 PRINCIPAL, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,035.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF AMEL ELSIDDIG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF OMAR ABDULLAH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTHEW WONG. DEFENDANT KENNETH WONG IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AMEL ELSIDDIG ASK THE COURT TO DISMISS THE PROPRIETOR WONG REALTY. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATED TO HAVE THEIR CASE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$140.00) SERVED NOV-14-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KENNETH DBA WONG REALTY LLC; DBA REAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$25.00) SERVED NOV-14-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, MATTHEW DBA WONG REALTY LLC, DBA REAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2023 - JUDGMENT.
